  "reference name": "RikaPast",
  "display name": "Mosourika's Past",
  "description": "Several years ago, Mosourika Tudor was a part of a band of thieves. They would frequently rob shipments addressed to Von Sanctus Industries from the Aurinax Harbor. They were eventually arrested, and Mosourika only avoided time in the dungeons by taking a plea deal.",

{ "reference name": "Blockade3", "display name": "Stolen Arcane Crystals", "description": "A thief known as the \"Mistweaving Phantom\" stole a dangerous shipment of high-capacity arcane crystals attuned to evocation magic. In the wrong hands, these crystals could produce an explosion capable of destroying a city block. This theft occurred the morning of Justin's death on an imperial ship owned by Crown Prince Aster. The Kingsguard have set up a blockade and prevented anyone from traveling in and out of Aurinax. original: There is a thief who calls themselves the "Mistweaving Phantom". They've been expertly robbing several merchant ships that were resting at Aurinax Harbor. They've also been breaking into the magically secured offices of the workers' unions and stealing administrative documents. Lastly, they broke into Stefanic Dracogen's office near the catwalk where Justin Waye fell from. They didn't steal the gold inside the safe, but they took the business documents inside. No one ever spots them, and they never leave any evidence behind—hence the name.

original:
Mosourika Tudor was delivering Justin's breakfast to him, but she couldn't find him in the freight area. She went looking for him and spotted him on the catwalk within the refinery. Aster de Wyverngarde was also there at the time and saw Justin yelling at a hairless animal. 

They both saw Justin get blasted with some sort of spell that took the shape of an expanding prism. This spell destroyed the guardrail of the catwalk and pushed Justin into the vat.
